completed_tasks.name: Spike 001/002/003 for 8501 adaptive workbench
completed_tasks.progress: Created .planning/spikes artifacts, verified 8501 code-level isolation, validated standalone prototype boot, and recorded PARTIAL verdicts.

remaining_tasks.name: Resume adaptive planning after dashboard triage

blockers.description: Formal GSD roadmap-based phase planning is blocked because .planning/ROADMAP.md does not exist.
blockers.workaround: Initialize roadmap/state before using gsd-add-phase or gsd-plan-phase.

blockers.description: Current dashboard issue has not been described yet, so no investigation has started.
blockers.workaround: On resume, capture the exact dashboard symptom, page, and reproduction steps first.

human_actions_pending.context: The user paused adaptive work because the dashboard has small problems, but no exact symptom or page has been recorded yet.

decisions.decision: Keep 8501 adaptive work as an isolated review-first console that does not touch main.py or the 8500 live dashboard.
decisions.rationale: Spike 001 showed code-level isolation is already viable and the live path must remain unaffected.

decisions.decision: Do not plan score tuning before the adaptive dataset pipeline exists.
decisions.rationale: Spike 002 found trade_attribution.csv is too sparse for real threshold tuning: empty feature payloads, no usable score field, and only dummy/NEUTRAL rows.

next_action: Start by capturing the exact dashboard bug symptoms and reproduction steps, then decide whether to investigate the live dashboard or the 8501 backtest dashboard first.
context_notes: Adaptive work was intentionally paused after finishing a feasibility spike because dashboard issues became more urgent. The next agent should not continue roadmap/phase planning until the dashboard interruption is triaged.
